config.adguard.stats_loaded: Connected — use the agent to query detailed statistics.
config.adguard.password_save_failed: Failed to save password to vault.
help.adguard.enabled: Enables the AdGuard Home integration. The agent can then query DNS statistics, manage filters, rewrites, blocked services, and more.
help.adguard.readonly: When enabled, the agent can only read data from AdGuard Home. All write operations are blocked.
help.adguard.url: Base URL of your AdGuard Home instance (e.g. http://192.168.1.1:3000).
help.adguard.username: Username for AdGuard Home authentication. Leave empty if auth is disabled.
help.adguard.password: Password for AdGuard Home authentication. Stored securely in the encrypted vault.
